advancement.betterend.root.title: Into the Dark
advancement.betterend.root.description: Enter the End dimension and face its dangers.
advancement.betterend.dragon.dragonslaye: Defeat the Ender Dragon and claim the heart of the void.
advancement.betterend.dragon.swift_slaye: Defeat the Ender Dragon in under 10 minutes.
advancement.betterend.dragon.phase_break: Destroy the Void Shield twice in a single dragon fight.
advancement.betterend.dragon.void_sovere: Defeat the Void Leviathan and end what the Aetherans began.
advancement.betterend.mobs.void_stalker_: Kill a Void Stalker before it disappears into the stone.
advancement.betterend.mobs.prism_crawler: Shatter a Prism Crawler along with its precious shards.
advancement.betterend.mobs.shade_lurker_: Drag a Shade Lurker out of the darkness and destroy it.
advancement.betterend.mobs.cliff_wraith_: Bring a Cliff Wraith crashing down from the peaks.
advancement.betterend.mobs.ancient_golem: Topple an Ancient End Golem, guardian of a lost civilization.
advancement.betterend.mobs.parasite_surv: Survive with three Ender Parasites latched on simultaneously.
advancement.betterend.mobs.bestiary_comp: Kill at least one of every new mob in the End.
advancement.betterend.exploration.void_w: Set foot in the cracked, lightless Void Wastes.
advancement.betterend.exploration.crysta: Walk among the towering crystal spires of the Crystalline Fields.
advancement.betterend.exploration.umbral: Enter the bioluminescent depths of the Umbral Forest.
advancement.betterend.exploration.skyrea: Scale the towering spires of the Skyreach Peaks.
advancement.betterend.exploration.sunken: Discover the ruins of the Sunken Citadel Region.
advancement.betterend.exploration.biome_: Explore all six of the new End biomes.
advancement.betterend.items.dragon_heart: Hold the Dragon Heart — still warm from the fight.
advancement.betterend.items.first_scales: Collect your first Void Scales from the dragon's hide.
advancement.betterend.items.endrite_mine: Mine Endrite Ore from the depths of the outer islands.
advancement.betterend.items.void_miner.d: Extract Void Dust from the raw ore of the End.
advancement.betterend.lore.archivist.des: Collect all eight Lore Tablets and uncover the truth of the Aetherans.
